name: Scoreboard Statusline
description: Sports scoreboard / ticker aesthetic where everything is a score or stat. Model shown as team name, context as heart health bar (hearts = remaining capacity), lines as total score, and cost/time as game stats.
preview: SONNET  ❤❤❤❤♡♡♡♡♡♡  CTX: 42%  COST: $0.124  TIME: 15m32s  LINES: 186  FIELD: main
features: Model displayed as uppercase team name (e.g. SONNET)
Context shown as heart health bar: filled ❤ = remaining, empty ♡ = used
Heart color escalates from green to yellow to red as context depletes
Lines written shown as cumulative score (add + remove)
Git branch shown as FIELD label
Bold uppercase labels for scoreboard aesthetic
